query:
-- Fix SGBHVJV (MtCottnMCIN - inbound service) back to the inbound billing item BI00658
UPDATE service_billing_assignments SET billingItemExternalId = 'BI00658', assignmentMethod = 'manual' WHERE serviceExternalId = 'SGBHVJV' AND billingItemExternalId = 'BI00660';

-- Check S1UMC04 (Aspley) current assignment
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, sba.billingItemExternalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount,
  ROUND((bi.lineAmount - CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL(10,2))) / bi.lineAmount * 100, 1) as marginPct
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.externalId = 'S1UMC04';

-- Also check all billing items for Aspley Firstcare Doctors
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId = (SELECT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S1UMC04' LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;
